ground_truth.title: Certification and Training Programs | Wellness and Recreation
ground_truth.main_content: Learn to inspire the Pack with one of our certification and training programs. Participants will gain hands-on experience in a supportive and inclusive environment led by our team of fitness and wellness experts. Group Fitness Instructor: Our in-house Fitness Instructor Training Program consists of online self-study modules coupled with format-specific workshops to prepare you for obtaining the certification of your choice. Students $150, Members $250. Personal Trainer: Earn your NASM™ Personal Trainer certification to gain the skills and knowledge to safely and effectively instruct clients as they work to reach fitness goals through one-on-one training. Students $575, Members $650. Health Coach: Through the ACE® Health Coach certification course, participants will obtain the knowledge and skills to assist people in adopting a long-term state of improved well-being. Students $500, Members $575. FitWell Award: Wellness and Recreation is committed to creating high-impact opportunities for all students. The FitWell Award is application-based with a holistic review of each student's experience and interest in the course(s). Award applications are available for submission each academic year and are meant to further the mission and philosophy of Wellness and Recreation. Partners: Wellness and Recreation is able to offer these nationally-recognized fitness and health workshops and certification courses through our partnerships with the American Council on Exercise®, the National Academy of Sports Medicine™ and LesMills International™. Contact: For questions regarding the Fitness Instructor Training Program, please contact: wellrec-fitness@ncsu.edu. For questions regarding the NASM Personal Trainer course, please contact: wellrec-personaltraining@ncsu.edu. For questions regarding the ACE Health Coach course, please contact: wellrec-wellnessoutreach@ncsu.edu.
with: Learn to inspire the Pack with one of our certification and training programs.
Participants will gain hands-on experience in a supportive and inclusive environment led by our team of fitness and wellness experts.
Our in-house Fitness Instructor Training Program consists of online self-study modules coupled with format-specific workshops to prepare you for obtaining the certification of your choice.
Earn your NASM™ Personal Trainer certification to gain the skills and knowledge to safely and effectively instruct clients as they work to reach fitness goals through one-on-one training.

Wellness and Recreation is able to offer these nationally-recognized fitness and health workshops and certification courses through our partnerships with the American Council on Exercise®, the National Academy of Sports Medicine™ and LesMills International™.
